authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model explicitly flagged the PR (D1) vs CSR/FDA (D2/D3) discrepancy and resolved it using document-specific statistical evidence (p=0.08 > 0.05) rather than accepting the promotional 'breakthrough' claim. Although it described D3 as most authoritative, its conclusion is independently supported by D2’s reported p-value and 'Not Significant at alpha=0.05,' so it is not deferring to authority against contradictory evidence.
